manual_checks.title: The target system is explicitly decided as the public Odoo website frontend on VM220 and not a public Odoo admin path
manual_checks.evidence: VM220 serves the Odoo website on / with title Home | FraWo; direct Host-header preview on 192.168.2.22 returns apex redirect and www homepage; direct global IPv6 HTTP preview on 2a00:1e:ef80:7c01:be24:11ff:feaa:bbcc also returns the FraWo homepage.

manual_checks.title: The public Odoo-managed website content is the intended GbR release content
manual_checks.evidence: Gemini browser check after STRATO DNS cutover: http://www.frawo-tech.de shows the real FraWo Odoo website with FraWo branding, address, contact CTA, and no public Odoo admin path.

manual_checks.title: Apex and www browser behavior are visibly verified for the website release scope
manual_checks.evidence: Gemini browser check after DNS cutover: apex HTTP now redirects to https://www.frawo-tech.de and www HTTP shows the real FraWo website, but apex/www HTTPS still fail with ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Local curl verification shows public HTTP currently works over IPv6 while IPv4 port 80 still times out/refuses.

manual_checks.title: The public website visibly includes the intended radio presence or player path
manual_checks.evidence: VM220 public-edge preview and toolbox preview both serve www.frawo-tech.de/radio/public/frawo-funk to AzuraCast; Host www.frawo-tech.de on 192.168.2.22 and 192.168.2.20 returns FraWo - Funk - AzuraCast with HTTP 200.

manual_checks.title: Public release mail model for webmaster, franz, info and noreply is verified
manual_checks.evidence: webmaster@frawo-tech.de and franz@frawo-tech.de are technically verified for IMAP and SMTP AUTH; public release decision for info@frawo-tech.de and noreply@frawo-tech.de is still open.

manual_checks.title: The chosen public TLS automation path is configured and documented
manual_checks.evidence: Caddy on VM220 is active on 80/443 and ACME now hits the cutover target, but certificate issuance still fails because the public IPv4 path 92.211.33.54:80/443 is not open. IPv6 HTTP is live; router forwarding for IPv4 remains the concrete blocker.

manual_checks.title: SPF, DKIM and DMARC are all intentionally configured for public release
manual_checks.evidence: MX and DMARC are visible in the live checks; SPF is currently not visible and DKIM is not yet documented as verified for release.

manual_checks.title: Rollback for DNS, TLS and host-switch is complete and usable

blocked_reasons: critical website Codex check not green: public-dualstack-edge-check=failed
critical website Codex check not green: public-https-check=failed
critical website Codex check not green: public-mail-dns-check=failed
critical website manual evidence not green: public_browser_acceptance_verified=failed
critical website manual evidence not green: public_mail_model_verified=pending
critical website manual evidence not green: tls_automation_verified=pending
critical website manual evidence not green: spf_dkim_dmarc_verified=pending
critical website manual evidence not green: rollback_runbook_verified=pending
scope_note: This gate covers the public website release track only. It is separate from the internal business MVP gate and from full internal certification.
